_metadata.description: FansToys items seed data — ready for database import
import_instructions: 1. Ensure continuity_families, factions, sub_groups, manufacturers, toy_lines, characters are seeded
2. For each item: resolve manufacturer_slug, toy_line_slug, character_slug to UUIDs
4. metadata JSONB holds: status, variant_type, base_product_code, sub_brand, notes
